title: Vote For Gendo
wikitext:
[]: Vote For Gendo!             Quote Post by cyharding » Mon Jun 07, 2010 9:57 am I thought this might be worth a few chuckles.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Mon Jun 07, 2010 9:58 am Oh, so cool!

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:00 pm Awesome!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:07 pm A reminder of how much NGE is part of the background culture (I guess like Doctor Who or Star Trek); and also how cosplay is accepted rather than stigmatised only something weirdos do.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:09 pm Japan is a nation of weirdos, though. :P Also, I couldn't vote for this man, even if I were Japanese. I like not being turned into orange goo.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Mon Jun 07, 2010 1:31 pm Legendary wrote: Also, I couldn't vote for this man, even if I were Japanese. I like not being turned into orange goo.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Mon Jun 07, 2010 5:02 pm i would probably not go with gendo if i needed to cosplay as an anime character in order to win votes. nope, gendo would probably be the last in my list. but either way, that is awesome .

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Mon Jun 07, 2010 8:19 pm I saw this today, too, and wondered if anyone had posted it. ^^; I like how Rei and Ikari are doing a duet. Classy. Like Tines-san, I find it interesting that this is part of their culture, always lurking in the background. My Evangelion Platinum boxset said that it was "Japan's Star Wars", which strikes me as plausible.

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Tue Jun 08, 2010 9:28 am Wait, No picture?

[]: Gendo has a hidden agenda. SHOCKER!             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Tue Jun 08, 2010 10:13 am Looks like everyone needs a reminder that the LDP is the party trying to pass the "harmful youth" bill which would make Evangelion illegal due to its portrayal of naked fourteen year-olds. He's just dressed as Gendo to throw you off. Meanwhile, everything's proceeding as planned...

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Tue Jun 08, 2010 10:24 am They've already said they wouldn't be targeting things like Evangelion. I imagine they're just going after smut, which is still enough to invoke an army of sad emoticons, in my book. Fallingtogrey wrote: No picture?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Tue Jun 08, 2010 11:57 am Fallingtogrey wrote: Wait, No picture?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Tue Jun 08, 2010 1:49 pm Who need's Obama now?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 08, 2010 2:45 pm toe mash : You're not hot-linking and it's not an over-used image macro, so why would the picture be deleted? Also, funny stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Wed Jun 09, 2010 1:33 am <.< >.> *casts ballot for Tsuruya-San*

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jun 09, 2010 8:48 am That picture is now my new Facebook profile pic.
